title: Street-Level Drain
content: The report mentions large cash withdrawals in North London. You cross-reference the locations and dates.||The withdrawals were made at ATMs within walking distance of 'The Void' and the Camden Fish Market. This is 'Cleaners' territory.||It looks like Vane wasn't just investigating the street muscle; he was funding them. Or perhaps, they were the ones extorting him for his silence regarding his addiction.
